case_title: 973 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MICHAEL MURRAY et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 973 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT GAVE THE PARTIES AN OPPORTUNITY TO TALK AND COME UP WITH AN ARRANGEMENT AMONG THEMSELVES. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 14, 2008. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY OCTOBER 6, 2008. REPLY TO BE FILED BY OCTOBER 10, 2008. MURRAY WAS SERVED WITH THE COPY OF THE ORDER IN THE COURTROOM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077 (301/HEK)

MINI MINUTES: Judge Harold Kahn, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-LaVena Ward, Dept. 604
Cause called for OSC re contempt, Temporary Restraining Order, and hearing on Preliminary injunction. The contempt hearing was not heard because papers were not served. The matter is re-set for Nov-05-08, at 1:30pm. As to the Preliminary Injunction, the matter was heard and granted. Ms. Brayer is to submit the paper work.
